zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide von Weimar於1055年出生在德國薩辛可德林波格巴倫斯泰特時，她的父親Otto I. von Weimar51歲，母親Adela van Leuven25歲。她於大約1072年與Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1100年3月28日在德國薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaide von Weimar于1055年出生在德国薩辛可德林波格巴倫斯泰特时，她的父亲Otto I. von Weimar51岁，母亲Adela van Leuven25岁。她于大约1072年与Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1100年3月28日在德国薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Weimar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernd, Hans, Kurt, Reinhard.
habitational name from any of several places called Weimar in Hesse and Thuringia.

variants.name: Weimer
meanings: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wini ‘friend’ + mār ‘famous’ or from another, composed of the elements wīg ‘battle, fight’ + mār ‘famous’.

variants.name: Waymer
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German   Weimar   or   Weimer  .

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide von Weimar was born in 1055, in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Saxony, Germany, her father, Otto I. von Weimar, was 51 and her mother, Adela van Leuven, was 25. She married Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt about 1072. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 28 March 1100, in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide von Weimar est née en 1055, à Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Otto I. von Weimar, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Adela van Leuven, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt environ 1072. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 mars 1100, à Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide von Weimar 1055 in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto I. von Weimar 51 und ihre Mutter Adela van Leuven 25. Sie hat um 1072 Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. März 1100 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide von Weimar è nata il nel 1055 nel Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Otto I. von Weimar, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Adela van Leuven, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt circa 1072. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 marzo 1100, nel Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide von Weimarが1055年にドイツサチセンクエドリンブルグボーレンステトで生まれた時，父Otto I. von Weimarは51歳，母Adela van Leuvenは25歳であった。約1072年にGraf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1100年3月28日にドイツサチセン-アンハルトクエドリンブルグボーレンステトで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide von Weimar(이)가 1055년 독일 작센 크들린버그 바렌스테드트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I. von Weimar(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adela van Leuven(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1072년 Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1100년 3월 28일 독일 작센-아할트 크들린버그 바렌스테드트에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide von Weimar nasceu em 1055, em Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto I. von Weimar, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Adela van Leuven, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt aproximadamente 1072. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de março de 1100, em Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide von Weimar родилась в 1055 г. в местности балленстедт, куедлинбург, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Otto I. von Weimar было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Adela van Leuven, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt около 1072 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 марта 1100 г. в местности балленстедт, куедлинбург, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelaide von Weimar nació en 1055, en Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Otto I. von Weimar, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Adela van Leuven, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt aproximadamente 1072. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de marzo de 1100, en Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 45 años.
